recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: Set It Up
recommendations.overview: Two overworked and underpaid assistants come up with a plan to get their bosses off their backs by setting them up with each other.

recommendations.title: Monster Family
recommendations.overview: The Wishbone family are far from happy. In an attempt to reconnect as a family, they plan a fun night out. However, the plan backfires when they are cursed and all turned into Monsters.

recommendations.title: One Small Hitch

recommendations.title: Blackadder: Back & Forth
recommendations.genres: Comedy, History, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: What was a cunning plan from Lord Edmund Blackadder V to fake a time machine on his gullibly incompetent friends, turns out to be the real thing and hurls him and his imbecile underling, Baldrick, through the course of human history.

recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.
